sentence_text: 嗨朋友们欢迎回到我的频道

translations.en: Hi friends, welcome back to my channel.

sentence_text: 今天我将继续用可理解性输入的方式教大家中文

translations.en: Today I'll continue teaching Chinese using comprehensible input.

sentence_text: 你只需要跟着我的视频多看多听

translations.en: Just watch and listen to my videos.

sentence_text: 然后跟着我多次的重复

translations.en: Then repeat after me multiple times.

sentence_text: 你就会学会这些简单易学的

translations.en: And you'll learn these simple and easy phrases.

sentence_text: 今天的主题呢我们来到了居住的家里

translations.en: Today's topic is about living at home.

sentence_text: 看看家里有哪些可以学习的内容呢

translations.en: Let's see what we can learn around the house.

sentence_text: 好,回家来到我们家的小区

translations.en: Okay, coming home to our residential complex.
This is the main gate of the complex.

sentence_text: 我们小区里有很多的植物

translations.en: There are many plants in our complex.
And there's this rockery.
This is a rockery.

sentence_text: 可以听到有青蛙的声音

translations.en: You can hear the sound of frogs.
It shows the environment is nice here.
There's the croaking of frogs.
There are many plants.
These are all plants.

sentence_text: 说明这个小区的绿化不错

translations.en: It shows the greenery in this complex is good.
The greenery is good.
Okay, that's this building.
There's a bicycle.
28th floor.
28th floor, so we need to go up.
So we press this to go up.
Up.
This is up.
This is down.
Down.
In our residential complex,

sentence_text: 这个电梯里一般也会有很多的这个广告

translations.en: there are usually many ads in the elevator.
Ads.

sentence_text: 住宅小区里电梯里经常会有很多这种广告

translations.en: In residential complexes, there are often many such ads in the elevator.
The elevator has arrived.

sentence_text: 我们住的二十八楼到了

translations.en: We've reached the 28th floor where we live.
Someone's home.
Should we knock first?
Or ring the doorbell.
Ring the doorbell.
This is the dining room at home.

sentence_text: 我们可以看到在这个餐桌上吃饭

translations.en: We can see people eating at this dining table.
This is the dining table.
The dining table has a table and chairs.

sentence_text: 还有我们看到这个上面

translations.en: And we can see up here,
this is a chandelier.
A chandelier.

sentence_text: 通过这个窗户我们可以看到外面

translations.en: Through this window we can see outside,

sentence_text: 可以看到对面的那一栋高楼

translations.en: we can see that tall building across the way.

sentence_text: 家中当然还有经常使用的

translations.en: At home, there are also things we often use,

sentence_text: 这个就可以把它倒出来泡茶

translations.en: you can pour this out to make tea.
What's in the kitchen?

sentence_text: 这一片都是厨房的区域

translations.en: This whole area is the kitchen.
In the kitchen there is a stove.

sentence_text: 这个的时候需要用这个来点火

translations.en: You need to use this to light it.
Use this to cook.

sentence_text: 所以这个也是厨房里必备的

translations.en: So this is also essential in the kitchen.
There are also various tools.
You can see scissors.

sentence_text: 这是厨房专用的这个剪刀

translations.en: These are kitchen scissors.
And there are various knives.
This is a knife.
Small knife

sentence_text: 还有我们切菜经常会用这种比较大的菜刀

translations.en: And we often use this larger kitchen knife for cutting vegetables
Use the kitchen knife to cut
The action of cutting vegetables is called 'cut'

sentence_text: 我们看到还有很多勺子

translations.en: We see there are also many spoons
This is a spoon

sentence_text: 这么大的勺子一般是用来舀这个汤

translations.en: A spoon this big is usually used for scooping soup
Scooping the soup from this bowl
Sink

sentence_text: 水池这个是用来洗碗的水池

translations.en: This sink is for washing dishes
And then this faucet

sentence_text: 洗好的碗会放在旁边这个小盒子里

translations.en: Washed dishes are placed in this small box next to it

sentence_text: 放在这个小盒子里晾干

translations.en: Placed in this small box to dry
Washed dishes are wet

sentence_text: 所以湿的碗我们会把它倒扣着

translations.en: So we place wet dishes upside down
Upside down in this box
To let them dry
This is the rice cooker for cooking rice
Rice cooker

sentence_text: 电饭包我们用这个来煮饭

translations.en: We use the rice cooker to cook rice

sentence_text: 因为大米米是我们的主食

translations.en: Because rice is our staple food
Rice is our staple food

sentence_text: 所以在这里最常见的也是每家每户都会有的

translations.en: So the most common thing here, found in every household,
is this rice cooker.
A very important appliance.

sentence_text: 这是很重要的一个家电

translations.en: This is a very important appliance.
These are all home appliances.

sentence_text: 家中的厨房怎么会少得了冰箱呢

translations.en: How could a kitchen be without a refrigerator?

sentence_text: 这是家中必备的又一个家电

translations.en: This is another essential home appliance.
That is the refrigerator.

sentence_text: 打开冰箱里面有很多的食物关上冰箱

translations.en: Open the fridge, there's lots of food inside; close the fridge.

sentence_text: 冰箱这个词之前我们在去一家商场那期视频里有教过大家

translations.en: We taught the word 'refrigerator' in a previous video about visiting a mall.
Remember?

sentence_text: 所以我建议大家能够反复的观看之前我们学过的视频

translations.en: So I suggest you watch our past videos repeatedly.
To deepen your memory.
Watch them many times over.

sentence_text: 并且跟着我这个慢速的中文去重复

translations.en: And repeat after my slow Chinese.

sentence_text: 去模仿我的这个语音语调

translations.en: Imitate my intonation and tone.

sentence_text: 多练习你一定会收获很大的进步

translations.en: Practice more, and you will surely make great progress.
Keep it up!
Water heater

And more importantly, taking a shower

translations.en: All require this water heater to heat the water

Given to us.

Very funny.

translations.en: Because the weather in our city is very hot.
Very hot.
Look outside, pull open the curtain.
The sun is blazing.
The weather is very hot.
It's only May now.
But the temperature outside is...

sentence_text: 我觉得空调是家中最重要的一个家电了

translations.en: I think the air conditioner is the most important appliance in the home.

sentence_text: 是家中最重要的一个家电

translations.en: It's the most important home appliance.

sentence_text: 家电的意思呢就是家用的电器

translations.en: Home appliances means household electrical devices.

sentence_text: 我们可以把这些电子产品啊都叫做电器

translations.en: We can call these electronic products appliances.
Appliances used in the home

sentence_text: 我们经常会把它叫做家电

For example, it's a home appliance.
A TV is also a home appliance.

sentence_text: 最近在很我觉得这个非常好说到这个语言的学习

translations.en: like socks, underwear, and so on. You can use a small washing machine.

translations.en: or have some mild cold symptoms, what do you do?

sentence_text: 这个词很好学它只有一个中文字药药这些都是药

translations.en: This word is easy to learn. It's just one Chinese character: medicine, medicine. These are all medicine.
